report.summary: Built 2 new pages: a comprehensive learn guide on tariffs/trade war impact on crypto markets, and an interactive stablecoin yield tracker tool with 15 protocols, filtering, sorting, and search.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Tariffs & Trade Wars impact on crypto — BTC dropped 47% from ATH, Fear & Greed at extreme fear for 46+ days, US 15% tariffs + 5 overlapping macro pressures driving the 2026 crash
Topic 2: Yield-bearing stablecoins — segment grew 15x faster than overall stablecoin market, $22.7B total market cap, sDAI at 6% APY, USDY at 4.25%, sUSDe at 5%, supply doubled in past year
Gap analysis: No existing tariff/trade-war crypto guide on degen0x despite being the #1 market narrative; no stablecoin yield comparison tool despite having learn articles on the topic
Sources: CoinShares, BeInCrypto, Crypto.com, The Block, DL News, Coin Bureau, Stablecoin Insider, CoinPaprika

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: 'Tariffs & Trade Wars: Impact on Crypto Markets 2026' — 8 sections + FAQ, ~3,400 words, covers 5 transmission channels, historical precedents table, 3 H2 2026 scenarios, 7 trading strategies
Tool page: 'Stablecoin Yield Tracker' — interactive React component with 15 stablecoin yield entries, search/filter/sort functionality, risk-colored card grid, summary stats bar

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Learn page: title='Tariffs & Trade Wars: Impact on Crypto Markets 2026 | degen0x', target keyword='tariffs crypto impact 2026', schemas: Article + FAQ (6 questions)
Tool page: title='Stablecoin Yield Tracker 2026: Compare Rates Across DeFi | degen0x', target keyword='stablecoin yield comparison', OG/Twitter cards configured
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
Internal links: 7 cross-links to existing guides/tools per page (bear market guide, market cycles, DCA calculator, fear-greed timeline, etc.)
